outputs: Room 19.0: booked by Office of Inherited Silences until previous notice.
The water in the west stairwell has passed inspection. It should not be thanked.
sleep denied: terminals are not permitted to dream during business hours
warnings: The training copy may contain deliberate duplicated text. Duplicate text must be preserved in order to prove the copy is not the original.
Where the command appears to answer a question not asked, attach the transcript to the nearest related form and do not ask the terminal to clarify itself.
If the response includes water, assume facilities jurisdiction unless the water is standing in a room that has been administratively removed.
